ideation: This animation sequence simulates the act of playing badminton, focusing on the arm movements involved in a serve or a shot. The sequence will emphasize the dynamic backswing and forward swing of one arm, while the other arm maintains balance.  The robot doesn't have hands, so we'll simulate the racket with arm position and orientation.  We will use a 3-frame sequence for simplicity and clarity. Frame 1 will show a backswing, frame 2 the midpoint of the swing, and frame 3 the follow-through after hitting the birdie.  We will use the right arm for the primary action.

frames.beat: right arm swings back, ready to strike
the arm whips forward, racket meeting the birdie
follow through with the swing, the point is won
